settings.sub: Estrogen drops in your 40s. Your body stores sugar differently — the cravings are real, and they're hormonal. UBurn supports up to 4 hours of fullness with glucomannan (konjac plant fiber).

settings.card_1_sub: Estrogen drops. Your insulin response changes. The cravings feel completely new — because they are.
settings.card_2_sub: Sugar craving hits harder, lasts longer, ignores discipline. It's your blood sugar — not your character.
settings.card_3_sub: Glucomannan (konjac plant fiber) forms a gel in your stomach for up to 4 hours of fullness. No caffeine. 30 cal.

settings.disclaimer: *Individual results may vary. Glucomannan — EFSA ID 3120. Use: 3g/day with water before meals. UBurn supports satiety — it does not treat menopause. These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA.
